Auto-onboard any git repo for Claude Code with self-maintaining documentation and interactive confidence scoring.

## Commands

```bash
npm run build  # package.json (rimraf dist && tsc)
npm run dev  # package.json (tsx src/index.ts)
npm run start  # package.json (node dist/index.js)
npm run test  # package.json (vitest run)
npm run lint  # package.json (eslint src --ext .ts --max-warnings 0)
npm run format  # package.json (prettier --write src)
npm run typecheck  # package.json (tsc --noEmit)
```

## Agents

Specialized agents are available in `.claude/agents/`. Use them for autonomous, delegated work:

- **reviewer** ‚Äî Spawn when reviewing PRs or code changes. Knows this repo's conventions, critical paths, and co-change coupling.
- **test-writer** ‚Äî Spawn when writing or updating tests. Knows the test framework, structure, and patterns.
- **doc-maintainer** ‚Äî Spawn after significant code changes to update documentation. Knows the auto-marker system.
- **security-auditor** ‚Äî Spawn for security reviews. Knows this repo's tech stack and attack surface.
